topic: Patriots are terrible this year rant

turns.content: bro the patriots are so bad its actually depressin me
Yeah, it's been rough. They've definitely been in a rebuilding phase. What specifically is frustrating you the most about them right now?
dude where do I even start the offense is unwatchable like actually painful to sit through. I grew up watchin brady and gronk and now im supposed to get hyped about THIS

That's the hardest part -- going from two decades of Brady-level play to a complete rebuild. The bar was set so impossibly high that anything less feels like a disaster. The offense has definitely been the weakest unit, no argument there.
and the thing is I dont even blame the young guys that much like they got no weapons bro the wide receiver room is brutal. name me one guy on that roster who would start on any other team ill wait

You're not wrong -- the receiver room has been one of the thinnest in the league. It's hard for any quarterback to develop when there's no one to throw to. They've needed to invest in skill positions for a while now, and it just hasn't happened at the level it needs to.

exactly and then everyone wanna blame the qb like bro give the kid some help first. put him behind a real o line and give him a legit number one receiver and then we can talk about whether he can play or not

That's a fair take. It's really hard to evaluate a young quarterback when the supporting cast isn't there. Even Brady wouldn't have looked great throwing to these receivers behind a shaky line. The front office needs to commit to building around whoever they want at QB.
my boy danny keeps sayin we should tank for a top pick and I hate that mentality but honestly bro at this point what else is there. were not competin with the bills or the dolphins like this

I get hating the tank mentality, especially for a franchise that was winning Super Bowls not that long ago. But there's something to be said for not being stuck in the middle -- either you're competing or you're building. Being a 6-11 team that picks 12th every year is the worst spot to be in.
thats the thing bro were stuck in no mans land not good enough to make the playoffs not bad enough to get a franchise changin pick its the worst place to be. I just want them to commit to a direction

That purgatory zone is the most painful place for any franchise. You need a clear vision -- either go all-in on competing or commit to a full rebuild and stockpile picks and young talent. The Pats need to pick a lane and go hard in that direction.
for real. my grandpa keeps tellin me stories about how bad they were in the 80s and 90s and im like grandpa I cant live through that I was spoiled by the brady era lol

Ha, that's the curse of the Brady era -- an entire generation of Pats fans who only know winning. Your grandpa lived through the bad times and came out the other side, so at least he knows it gets better eventually. It just might take some patience to get there.
patience is not my strong suit bro but whatever I guess ill keep watchin every sunday like a clown and gettin mad about it

That's what being a real fan is honestly -- you show up even when it hurts. The bandwagon fans already left after Brady. When the Pats eventually turn it around, you'll be able to say you stuck it out through the dark years. Respect.
